claim: the sum of any two even natural numbers is even
twice any natural number is even
every natural number squared is at least the number itself
for any integers a and b, (a + b)^2 = a^2 + 2*a*b + b^2
the remainder when 10^9 is divided by 7 is 6
there is no largest natural number: for every n there is a strictly bigger one
the square root of 2 is irrational
